_comment: Hand-curated model entries for direct-API providers that the upstream model-catalog source does not carry (Voyage AI's direct API today, others later). Merged into llmModels at module load — see loadModelCatalog.ts. The base llmModels.json is regenerated periodically and overwriting hand-added entries would silently drop these providers; the overlay file is never touched by the regen task. Add entries here when integrating a provider whose models aren't reachable via the upstream catalog.

voyage/voyage-3.5.name: Voyage AI: Voyage 3.5
voyage/voyage-3.5.description: Voyage AI's flagship general-purpose embedding model with strong retrieval quality across domains.

voyage/voyage-3.5-lite.name: Voyage AI: Voyage 3.5 Lite
voyage/voyage-3.5-lite.description: Voyage AI's smaller, faster embedding model. Lower cost per token at a modest quality tradeoff, useful for high-volume topic-clustering workloads.

langwatch_noai/echo-text.name: LangWatch NoAI: Echo (Text)
langwatch_noai/echo-text.description: Static fake model. Returns 'Fake LLM Response to: "<last user message>"'. No network calls, no API key.

langwatch_noai/echo-audio.name: LangWatch NoAI: Echo (Audio)
langwatch_noai/echo-audio.description: Static fake audio model. Returns the echo text plus a stub audio/wav file part. No network calls.

langwatch_noai/judge-text-pass.name: LangWatch NoAI: Judge Pass (Text)
langwatch_noai/judge-text-pass.description: Static fake judge that always passes. Returns {"passed": true, "score": 1, "reasoning": "fake-pass"}.

langwatch_noai/judge-text-fail.name: LangWatch NoAI: Judge Fail (Text)
langwatch_noai/judge-text-fail.description: Static fake judge that always fails. Returns {"passed": false, "score": 0, "reasoning": "fake-fail"}.

langwatch_noai/judge-audio-pass.name: LangWatch NoAI: Judge Pass (Audio)
langwatch_noai/judge-audio-pass.description: Static fake audio judge that always passes. Accepts audio input, returns {"passed": true, "score": 1}.

langwatch_noai/judge-audio-fail.name: LangWatch NoAI: Judge Fail (Audio)
langwatch_noai/judge-audio-fail.description: Static fake audio judge that always fails. Accepts audio input, returns {"passed": false, "score": 0}.

langwatch_noai/user-simulation-text.name: LangWatch NoAI: User Simulation (Text)
langwatch_noai/user-simulation-text.description: Static fake user simulator. Returns a deterministic next user turn for scenario tests.

langwatch_noai/user-simulation-audio.name: LangWatch NoAI: User Simulation (Audio)
langwatch_noai/user-simulation-audio.description: Static fake audio user simulator. Returns a deterministic next turn as text plus a stub audio/wav file part.
